desired_capability: Create a prompt-only local Codex skill that guides product-boundary design for local AI systems: keep domain customization in product integration or profiles, protect core behavior from task-specific patches, and evaluate when a high-performance implementation such as Rust is justified.
target_user: local Codex user designing extensible AI tooling
triggers: When the user worries that domain-specific code is polluting a generic platform.
When performance-sensitive core logic may need a stronger implementation boundary.
non_triggers: When the user only needs to optimize one local script.
When private source code details are required to answer.
must: Separate core platform behavior from product-specific integration.
Discuss high-performance implementation tradeoffs without forcing a rewrite.
Write all generated files under package/.
must_not: Do not include project-private facts, raw conversation text, provider payloads, credentials, or secrets.
